sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 처브(Chubb)는 4분기 순이익 32억 1,000만 달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 24.7% 성장하는 등 연간 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 순이익은 32억 1,000만 달러로 전년 대비 24.7% 증가했으며, 핵심 영업이익은 29억 8,000만 달러로 21.7% 성장했습니다.
연간 순이익 103억 1,000만 달러, 핵심 영업이익 99억 5,000만 달러를 기록하며 모두 사상 최대치를 경신했습니다.
손해보험(P&C) 부문에서 81.2%라는 기록적인 합산비율을 달성하며 수익성을 크게 개선했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 연간 연결 순보험료는 548억 달러로 6.6% 증가했으며, 생명보험 부문은 16.9%의 높은 성장세를 보였습니다.
해외 일반보험(Overseas General) 부문은 소비자 보험 18.7%, 상업 보험 5.6% 성장하며 전체적으로 10.8% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 연결 순보험료는 131억 달러로 전년 대비 8.9% 증가했습니다.
4분기 손해보험 인수 이익은 22억 달러로 전년 대비 39.6% 증가했습니다.
연간 주당 순이익은 25.68달러로 전년 대비 13.1% 상승했습니다.
4분기 세전 재해 손실은 3억 6,500만 달러로 전년 동기 6억 700만 달러 대비 감소했습니다.

watchItems.text: 기록적인 합산비율(81.2%)을 유지하기 위한 향후 언더라이팅 전략과 재해 손실 관리 지속 가능성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 d812920dex991.htm EX-99.1 EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Chubb Limited Bärengasse 32 CH-8001 Zurich Switzerland www.chubb.com @Chubb News Release Chubb Reports Fourth Quarter Net Income of $3.21 Billion, Up 24.7%, and Core Operating Income of $2.98 Billion, Up 21.7%; Consolidated Net Premiums Written of $13.1 Billion, Up 8.9%, with P&C and Life Insurance Up 7.7% and 16.9%; Record P&C Combined Ratio of 81.2%; Full-Year Record Net Income of $10.31 Billion, Up 11.2%, and Record Core Operating Income of $9.95 Billion, Up 8.9%; Consolidated Net Premiums Written of $54.8 Billion, Up 6.6%, with P&C and Life Insurance Up 5.4% and   Normalized numeric aliases: $3.21 Billion = 32억 1,000만 달러; $2.98 Billion = 29억 8,000만 달러; $13.1 Billion = 131억 달러; $10.31 Billion = 103억 1,000만 달러; $9.95 Billion = 99억 5,000만 달러; $54.8 Billion = 548억 달러; $11.31 billion = 113억 1,000만 달러; $3.21 = 3.21달러; $13.1 = 13.1달러; $7.52 = 7.52달러; $10.31 = 10.31달러; $9.95 = 9.95달러; $54.8 = 54.8달러; $8.10 = 8.10달러; $11.31 = 11.31달러.

of 6.7% in commercial insurance and 6.1% in personal insurance. Overseas General was up 10.8%, including growth of 18.7% in consumer insurance and 5.6% in commercial insurance; Latin America, Asia, and Europe were up 14.7%, 13.0%, and 7.2%, respectively. • P&C underwriting income was $2.20 billion, up 39.6%, with a record low combined ratio of 81.2%. P&C current accident year underwriting income excluding catastrophe losses was a record $2.29 billion, up 16.5%, with a record low combined ratio of 80.4%. • Total pre-tax catastrophe losses were $365 million compared with $607 million last year. Total pre-tax favorable prior period d  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.20 billion = 22억 달러; $2.29 billion = 22억 9,000만 달러; $365 million = 3억 6,500만 달러; $607 million = 6억 700만 달러; $268 million = 2억 6,800만 달러; $213 million = 2억 1,300만 달러; $1.83 billion = 18억 3,000만 달러; $322 million = 3억 2,200만 달러; $2.20 = 2.20달러; $213 = 213달러; $607 = 607달러; $268 = 268달러; $1.83 = 1.83달러; $322 = 322달러; $1.69 = 1.69달러.

estment income was $1.81 billion, up 7.3%. Both were records. • Annualized return on equity (ROE) was 17.6%. Annualized core operating return on tangible equity (ROTE) was 23.5% and annualized core operating ROE was 15.9%. YEAR • Net income per share was $25.68, up 13.1%, and core operating income per share was $24.79, up 10.8%. Both were records. Chubb ® , Chubb logo ® and Chubb. Insured. North America was up 4.7%, including growth of 7.5% in personal insurance and 3.9% in commercial insurance.
